overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy traversing a lush tropical environment. The character moves from dense jungle through a coastal palm grove and ascends a rocky mountain path, showcasing the game's detailed vegetation and dynamic lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense tropical jungle path with thick fern undergrowth

events.description: wooden fortification wall becomes visible through the trees ahead

agents.ego_description: navigating through thick ferns and undergrowth in the dense jungle

entered.detail: tropical hardwood trees forming a dense canopy overhead
thick undergrowth of green ferns covering the forest floor
rustic wooden defensive wall with pointed stakes
various tropical plants and bushes lining the path

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a dense tropical jungle with thick fern undergrowth and tall trees forming a partial canopy. The character moves forward through the narrow enclosed path, with diffused sunlight filtering through the leaves. Around 12 seconds, a wooden fortification wall becomes visible ahead, indicating an approaching settlement boundary.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal palm grove with beach access

events.description: exits dense forest into open coastal area with palm trees and beach visible
lighting shifts from diffused shade to bright direct sunlight

agents.ego_description: moving through palm trees along the coastline with the beach visible to the left

entered.detail: tall palm trees with visible trunks scattered across the coastal area
sandy shoreline visible in the distance beyond the palm grove
low-lying bushes and grasses adapted to coastal conditions

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the dense jungle into a wide-open coastal palm grove. The lighting shifts dramatically from diffused shade to bright direct sunlight. The wooden fortification is left behind as the character moves through scattered palm trees with a sandy beach visible in the distance to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: tropical hillside with rock outcrops and mixed vegetation

events.description: character begins climbing over rocks and roots, transitioning from flat ground to ascending terrain

agents.ego_description: climbing over rocks and roots through mixed vegetation on the hillside

entered.detail: massive weathered boulders and rocky formations on the hillside
distinctive bushes with bright red foliage or flowers

segments.scene_description: Moving away from the coast, the character enters a semi-covered hillside area with mixed lighting. The terrain becomes more rugged with large rock outcrops appearing in the path. Red flowering bushes dot the left side of the trail as the character begins ascending over rocks and roots, transitioning from the flat coastal area to steeper terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky mountain overlook with panoramic valley views

agents.ego_description: ascending steep rocky path with panoramic mountain views and weapon visible on back

entered.detail: majestic mountain peaks with misty valleys in the far distance
sweeping vista of the valley below with scattered vegetation
steep rocky cliff forming the edge of the mountain path

segments.scene_description: The final segment opens onto a wide-open rocky mountain path with sparse vegetation. The character continues ascending along the cliff edge, revealing a breathtaking panoramic view of distant mountain ranges and valleys. The terrain is predominantly rocky with the path winding along the mountainside, offering clear views of the expansive landscape ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a claustrophobic tropical jungle into a vast, elevated mountain vista. It begins within a dense forest of thick ferns and tall canopy trees where diffused sunlight filters through the leaves, moving along a narrow path toward a wooden fortification wall. As the character passes the fortification, the scene opens abruptly into a bright, sun-drenched coastal palm grove with a sandy beach visible in the distance. The camera then shifts away from the coast and begins to ascend a rugged hillside, where the flat terrain gives way to rock outcrops and red flowering bushes. Finally, the path emerges onto a wide-open rocky mountain ledge, revealing a breathtaking panoramic view of distant valleys and mountain ranges under a clear sky.
